title: Nio earnings Q2 2023
text: NIO reported Q2 2023 financial results with vehicle deliveries of 23,520 units, representing a 6.1% decrease from Q2 2022 and 24.2% decrease from Q1 2023. Vehicle sales reached RMB 7,185.2 million (US$990.9 million), down 24.9% from Q2 2022. Net loss reached RMB 6,055.8 million (US$835.1 million), representing 119.6% increase from Q2 2022. Wall Street expected loss of 41 cents per share on revenue of $1.27 billion compared to year-ago quarter loss of 24 cents per share on $1.48 billion revenue. For Q3 2023, NIO expected deliveries between 55,000 and 57,000 vehicles, up significantly from 31,607 EVs delivered in Q3 2022. Earnings revealed challenging financial results due to product transitions and pricing pressures, though management highlighted recovery momentum with strong July deliveries.
